prompt_task: Retrieve the single base genomic position for the following variant identifiers: rs200533370, rs241311, NM_006492.3:c.595-2A>T, CA548798891, VCV000587372.6, OMIM 616787.0001 on the GRCh38 reference assembly. Report in semi-colon separated chr#:position format (1-based, inclusive), no spaces (e.g. chr1:2;chr2:34). Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
